SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.title: Zoe
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.anci: Imagine seeing [sine]you[/sine] again after so long.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.IRONCLAD.0-1.char:
[jitter][b]SACRED DEMON![/b][/jitter]
What have you done to me!?
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.anc:
Do the lost tribes weigh on you...?
[i][font_size=22]SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE howls with laughter.[/font_size][/i]
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.IRONCLAD.2-0.anci: My puppet of puppets... why haven’t you killed the Architect yet?
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.IRONCLAD.2-1.char: After I kill the Architect, I will kill [jitter][b]YOU![/b][/jitter]
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.IRONCLAD.2-2.anci:
[i][font_size=22][sine]Yawn[/sine][/font_size][/i]
I look forward to watching you fail.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.a: We both seek [sine]vengeance[/sine]. It will have a cost to pay.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.c: I accept any cost. Every cost for his death.
I know where you got that [sine]Hand[/sine].
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.NECROBINDER.2-0.a: The Architect has gravely wounded us both.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1.c: Get on with it, demon. Show me your contracts.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.REGENT.0-0.ancien: A being from the stars? Within these accursed walls?
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.REGENT.0-2.ancien: Yes, I think we can help each other.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.REGENT.1-0r.ancie: More of my power can be yours for a small price.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.REGENT.2-0.char: I don’t think these deals are good. I’m not feeling great.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.REGENT.2-1.ancien:
You read the contracts thoroughly have you not?
You have signed them with full intent and responsibility no?
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.REGENT.2-2.ancien:
Are you not going to fulfill your end of the bargain?
How about another contract? Isn’t that better?
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.SILENT.1-0r.ancie: [i][font_size=22]SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE displays his various contracts to the Silent[/font_size][/i]
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancien: The Architect is not enough, kill your sisters too!
SLAYRUNETERRA-ZOE.talk.SILENT.2-2.ancien: No need for words, we are the same.
